hypotheses.name: descriptor/workspace rebuild cost
hypotheses.method: runner wall-clock timing around helix::Context construction with CUDA sync boundaries
hypotheses.interpretation: Context init timing is available as a P0 proxy, but descriptor/workspace rebuild counters are not separated yet.
hypotheses.downstream_action: Add internal descriptor/workspace counters before backend redesign comparison.

hypotheses.name: host copy / result extraction cost
hypotheses.method: runner wall-clock timing around final reduced-density extraction with CUDA sync boundaries
hypotheses.interpretation: Result extraction time is captured; D2H byte attribution remains a future internal counter.
hypotheses.downstream_action: Split reduced-density copy bytes and host allocation cost in the backend redesign harness.

hypotheses.name: device-wide sync serialization
hypotheses.method: explicit runner cudaDeviceSynchronize calls around each measured phase
hypotheses.interpretation: Runner sync boundaries are known, but internal library synchronization is not independently counted.
hypotheses.downstream_action: Replace device-wide timing fences with stream/event timing where redesign experiments need overlap evidence.

hypotheses.name: stream/handle ownership cost
hypotheses.method: runner wall-clock timing around Context construction; no public API profiling sink is enabled
hypotheses.interpretation: Handle ownership cost is only visible through aggregate init timing in this P0 evidence.
hypotheses.downstream_action: Add opt-in internal handle lifetime counters outside public headers.

hypotheses.name: transpose/layout hotspot
hypotheses.method: reserved evidence slot for future internal counters or optional NVTX markers
hypotheses.interpretation: No transpose/layout hotspot data is collected by the current runner.
hypotheses.downstream_action: Instrument transpose/layout markers in PLAN-T7 or backend redesign profiling runs.

notes: Context phase timing with HEOMSolver smoke calibration; no legacy CLI output files expected
